title: Changelog - What’s new: October 1st - November 3rd
excerpt:

NEW: create and delete teams mutations 
Hotfix: item_id argument changed on pin_to_top and unpin_from_…

posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
Here’s what’s new in our changelog from the past month.

Apps

Webhook integration: new 3-minute timeout policy

API

NEW: create and delete teams mutations

Hotfix: item_id argument changed on pin_to_top and unpin_from_top mutations

Upgrading GraphQL parser to be more compliant

Breaking change: Unified format for API errors
